purpose: Admit text-bearing YouTube Shorts fragrance candidates for transcript-only rhetorical-tone fixture work.

required_gates: serving_surface == shorts from candidate serving-surface verification
automatic_abstain_gates: unknown or unverified Shorts serving surface
scoreable_now: text-derived rhetorical tone labels that can be justified from words and phrasing
speaking posture categories visible in transcript text, with abstain allowed

storage_posture.caption_packets: file-packet output under C:\tmp, not committed to the repo and not committed to a durable Orca data root
storage_posture.asr_packets: Orca data-lake format under a temporary initialized root at C:\tmp\youtube_shorts_fragrance_asr_lake_v0, not the operator durable lake
storage_posture.production_requirement: Before production fixture use, recapture or migrate admitted transcript/audio packets into the operator-configured external ORCA_DATA_ROOT and refresh pointers.

accepted_residuals: The admitted set is 28, not 30; two candidate rows were public Shorts but yielded ASR no_speech with zero cues.
Creator balance is uneven: JeremyFragrance has 1 admitted row while the other selected creators have 3 each.
This fixture is acceptable for lane viability and prompt/procedure testing, but not for a balanced cross-creator benchmark unless replacements are captured.
Transcript-only tone must carry an abstain path and must not include text-derived energy claims.
Raw packets and derived records currently live in C:\tmp scratch locations and are not durable production evidence.

replacement_requirement_if_hard_30.recommendation: Find and capture two additional text-bearing Shorts before claiming a 30-row transcript-tone fixture.
replacement_requirement_if_hard_30.preferred_replacement_source: JeremyFragrance if preserving the original 3-per-creator balance matters; otherwise any fragrance creator matching the same public Shorts and transcript gates.
